[index.html.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28628882/index.html.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>빔프로젝터 사용 설명서 — 중앙대학교광명병원</title>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qrcodejs@1.0.0/qrcode.min.js"></script>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --red:#c0392b;--red-light:#fdecea;
  --blue:#1a56db;--blue-light:#ebf0ff;
  --green:#0e9f6e;--green-light:#f0fdf4;
  --amber:#d97706;--amber-light:#fffbeb;
  --dark:#1a1a2e;
  --border:#e2e8f0;--bg:#f8fafc;--surface:#fff;
  --text:#0f172a;--text2:#475569;--text3:#94a3b8;
}
body{font-family:'Apple SD Gothic Neo','Malgun Gothic','Noto Sans KR',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-size:15px;line-height:1.6}

/* ── QR LANDING PAGE ── */
#qrLanding{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;padding:32px 20px;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e 0%,#16213e 50%,#0f3460 100%)}
.qr-logo{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:32px;text-transform:uppercase}
.qr-title{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.3}
.qr-subtitle{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-bottom:36px}
.qr-box{background:#fff;padding:16px;border-radius:16px;display:inline-block;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.3);margin-bottom:20px}
.qr-hint{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:40px;line-height:1.6}
.qr-hint strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)}
.qr-divider{width:60px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);margin:0 auto 24px}
.qr-open-btn{background:var(--red);color:#fff;border:none;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.3px;transition:opacity .15s}
.qr-open-btn:hover{opacity:.85}

/* ── MANUAL PAGE ── */
#manualPage{display:none;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 0 40px}

/* Header */
.man-header{background:var(--dark);color:#fff;padding:20px 20px 16px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.man-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px}
.man-logo{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);letter-spacing:.5px}
.man-back{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;border:none;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit}
.man-back:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.man-warn{background:var(--red);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.man-warn-icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0}
.man-warn-text{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;color:#fff}

/* Steps */
.steps-wrap{padding:20px 16px 0}
.section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;padding-left:2px}

.step{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:10px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;align-items:flex-start}
.step-num{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0}
.n1{background:var(--red-light);color:var(--red)}
.n2{background:var(--blue-light);color:var(--blue)}
.n3{background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32}
.n4{background:var(--amber-light);color:var(--amber)}
.n5{background:#ede7f6;color:#6a1b9a}
.n6{background:#e0f7fa;color:#00695c}
.step-body{flex:1}
.step-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.65}
.step-text strong{font-weight:700}
.step-note{margin-top:6px;background:var(--amber-light);border-left:3px solid var(--amber);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;font-size:12px;color:#7c4c00;line-height:1.5}

/* Panel image */
.panel-section{margin:20px 16px 0}
.panel-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden}
.panel-card-header{padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.panel-img{width:100%;display:block}
.panel-annotations{padding:12px 16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
.ann-item{background:var(--bg);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5}
.ann-item .ann-key{font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px}
.ann-item .ann-val{color:var(--text2)}
.ann-item.red .ann-key{color:var(--red)}
.ann-item.green .ann-key{color:var(--green)}
.ann-item.amber .ann-key{color:var(--amber)}
.ann-item.blue .ann-key{color:var(--blue)}

/* Info boxes */
.info-section{margin:16px 16px 0}
.info-box{border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px}
.info-box.yellow{background:var(--amber-light);border:1px solid #f6c860}
.info-box.green{background:var(--green-light);border:1px solid #86efac}
.info-box .ib-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.info-box.yellow .ib-title{color:#7c4c00}
.info-box.green .ib-title{color:#065f46}
.info-box .ib-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.7}
.info-box.yellow .ib-body{color:#7c4c00}
.info-box.green .ib-body{color:#065f46}

/* Contact */
.contact-bar{margin:16px 16px 0;background:var(--dark);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;text-align:center}
.contact-bar .cb-label{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.contact-bar .cb-num{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px}

/* Progress dots */
.progress-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:16px 16px 0;justify-content:center}
.prog-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);transition:background .2s}
.prog-dot.done{background:var(--green)}
.prog-dot.active{background:var(--blue);width:20px;border-radius:4px}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ─── QR LANDING ─── -->
<div id="qrLanding">
  <div class="qr-logo">중앙대학교광명병원</div>
  <div class="qr-title">빔프로젝터<br>사용 설명서</div>
  <div class="qr-subtitle">행사 준비 전 반드시 확인하세요</div>
  <div class="qr-box" id="qrCodeBox"></div>
  <div class="qr-hint">
    <strong>📱 QR 스캔 방법</strong><br>
    카메라 앱 또는 QR 스캐너로<br>위 코드를 스캔하면<br>핸드폰에서 바로 볼 수 있습니다
  </div>
  <div class="qr-divider"></div>
  <button class="qr-open-btn" onclick="openManual()">📖 설명서 바로 보기</button>
</div>

<!-- ─── MANUAL ─── -->
<div id="manualPage">

  <div class="man-header">
    <div class="man-header-top">
      <div class="man-logo">중앙대학교광명병원 · 빔프로젝터 사용안내</div>
      <button class="man-back" onclick="closeManual()">← QR로 돌아가기</button>
    </div>
    <div class="man-warn">
      <div class="man-warn-icon">⚠️</div>
      <div class="man-warn-text">빔프로젝터 ELEVATION-UP 전<br>반드시 전원 OFF 하세요</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="steps-wrap">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:4px">시작 순서 — 순서대로 진행하세요</div>

    <div class="step" id="s1">
      <div class="step-num n1">1</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text"><strong>빨간색 Main 전원 버튼</strong>을 눌러 전원을 켜세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="step" id="s2">
      <div class="step-num n2">2</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text">정확히 <strong>1분 대기</strong> 후 아래 순서를 진행하세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="step" id="s3">
      <div class="step-num n3">3</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text">터치패드 상단 메뉴에서 <strong>▶ 프로젝터 ◀</strong> 를 선택하세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="step" id="s4">
      <div class="step-num n4">4</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text"><strong>프로젝터 및 스크린 하단 버튼(↓)</strong>을 눌러 작동시키세요</div>
        <div class="step-note">※ 프로젝터가 하단으로 내려왔는지 반드시 확인하세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="step" id="s5">
      <div class="step-num n5">5</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text">사용할 프로젝터 번호 <strong>1, 2, 3, 4 중 선택</strong>하여 전원을 켜세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="step" id="s6">
      <div class="step-num n6">6</div>
      <div class="step-body">
        <div class="step-text"><strong>전자교탁으로 이동</strong>하여 PC 전원을 켜세요</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Control panel image -->
  <div class="panel-section">
    <div class="panel-card">
      <div class="panel-card-header">📸 실제 컨트롤 패널 위치</div>
      <img class="panel-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="빔프로젝터 컨트롤 패널">
      <div class="panel-annotations">
        <div class="ann-item red">
          <div class="ann-key">🔴 Main 전원 버튼</div>
          <div class="ann-val">오른쪽 벽면 ON/OFF 버튼 → 1단계</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ann-item amber">
          <div class="ann-key">🟡 프로젝터 메뉴</div>
          <div class="ann-val">터치패드 상단 황색 버튼 → 3단계</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ann-item blue">
          <div class="ann-key">⬇️ 하단 내리기 버튼</div>
          <div class="ann-val">각 프로젝터/스크린 아래화살표 → 4단계</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ann-item green">
          <div class="ann-key">🔴 화면 끄기 버튼</div>
          <div class="ann-val">각 열 하단 빨간 버튼 → 종료 시 사용</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="info-section">
    <div class="info-box yellow">
      <div class="ib-title">💡 프로젝터 전원이 켜지지 않을 때</div>
      <div class="ib-body">
        터치패드 <strong>초록색 아이콘</strong>을 터치하세요.<br>
        색상이 <strong>빨간색</strong>으로 바뀌면 5~8초 기다린 후,<br>
        다시 한 번 아이콘을 눌러주세요.
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-box green">
      <div class="ib-title">◆ 주의사항 ◆</div>
      <div class="ib-body">
        행사 쉬는 시간 또는 리허설 종료 후에는<br>
        <strong>▶ 화면 끄기 ◀</strong> 버튼을 반드시 눌러주세요.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-bar">
    <div class="cb-label">관리 문의</div>
    <div class="cb-num">통신실 (내선) 6617, 6618 &nbsp;|&nbsp; 시설팀 9338</div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function openManual(){
  document.getElementById('qrLanding').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('manualPage').style.display='block';
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}
function closeManual(){
  document.getElementById('manualPage').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('qrLanding').style.display='flex';
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

// Auto-detect mobile (hash or small screen) → go straight to manual
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
  var url = window.location.href;
  if(window.location.hash === '#manual' || window.innerWidth < 600){
    openManual();
  }

  // Generate QR pointing to this same file with #manual
  var qrUrl = url.split('#')[0] + '#manual';
  new QRCode(document.getElementById('qrCodeBox'), {
    text: qrUrl,
    width: 180,
    height: 180,
    colorDark: '#000000',
    colorLight: '#ffffff',
    correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
